name: python3-apispec
title: python3-apispec
description:
pluggable API specification generator (Python 3)
This package contains a pluggable API specification generator. It currently
supports the OpenAPI Specification (f.k.a. the Swagger specification).
The features are:
- Supports the OpenAPI Specification (versions 2 and 3)
- Framework-agnostic
- Built-in support for marshmallow
- Utilities for parsing docstrings
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-apispec because pluggable API specification generator (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-apispec as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-apispec with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-apispec --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
